name: AdV5_fiber_knob_tropism
description: AdV5 L5 fiber gene encoding the trimeric fiber protein whose C-terminal knob domain mediates primary-receptor binding. Species C (Ad2/Ad5) fibers bind CAR (CXADR); species B and D bind CD46 or sialic acid; species F (Ad40/41) Ad41 carries two fiber proteins (long Ad41L and short Ad41S) — unique among human adenoviruses — and uses both CAR and a yet-uncharacterized receptor for enteric tropism. Knob-domain sequences are the principal serotype-discrimination target.
expected_copy_count: 1 per genome (or 2 fiber genes in Ad40/41)
